reasoning: The control IA-5(11) focuses on hardware token-based authentication, which is a method of authenticator management typically handled at the identity provider level or through cloud IAM services. Kubernetes itself does not manage hardware token-based authentication directly. Instead, Kubernetes relies on external identity providers for authentication, such as OIDC, which can integrate with hardware token solutions. Therefore, this control is not directly applicable to Kubernetes security architecture.
title: Authenticator Management - Authenticator management | hardware token - based authentication [withdrawn
